justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's request for a two-hour session on Thursday afternoons, but it repeatedly checked for specific Thursdays instead of a broader search for any Thursday in June as requested by the user.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls by checking for specific Thursdays one by one, instead of performing a broader search for all Thursdays in June as requested by the user.
